# TelcoOS

> An agentic chat workspace for telecom. You talk to it; it pulls straight from
> your switch, runs the heavy data analysis your laptop can't, and builds the
> rate decks, dashboards, and reports your desk needs — on your command, with the
> AI provider of your choice. "Agentic" here means it does the work when asked
> (not that it runs autonomously).

Built for the carriers in the middle — voice wholesalers, termination providers,
and aggregators whose P&L is the spread. The job means hunting the signal in the
noise across huge data: artifacts from backend systems are too big to even open
in Excel (CDR files run to gigabytes). TelcoOS reduces it to a clear read.

## How it works
1. Connect your switch — the shipped skills already know the supported switch
   platforms' APIs and pull routing, CDRs, and backend data out of the box.
2. Bring your AI — run on the provider you trust, picked per task; your data and
   keys stay with your provider.
3. Just ask — give it a question or an objective; it runs the analysis and builds
   the artifact, on your command.

## What it does today
- Crunches data your laptop can't — gigabyte CDRs and 50M+ records, pulled
  straight from your switch. No exports, no Excel ceiling.
- Builds real artifacts on demand — optimal customer rate decks, per-NPANXX
  vendor target sheets, weekly growth emails, and a daily profitability dashboard
  that beats the switches' own.
- Ships with an operator's brain — knows your switch's APIs and the domain (ASR,
  ALOC, release causes), so it works out of the box.
- LLM- and switch-agnostic — no lock-in on AI provider or switch platform.
- Extensible with your own skills — teach a repeatable workflow once, reuse it.
- Surfaces what needs attention — a sweep of live traffic flags issues and
  suggests routing moves; you decide.

## On the roadmap (in active development)
The autonomy layer: the sweep running unattended within your guardrails, a
self-learning memory that compounds day to day, and self-driving optimization
that continuously re-prices and re-routes toward the margin you set.

## Who it's for
Voice wholesalers, termination providers, and aggregators who need answers out of
their stack faster than the carrier across the table.

## Contact
- Site: https://telcoos.io
- Email: ahoy@telcoos.io
